subject: WM-0090 review: verified
body: No blocking findings. Verified pnpm build:desktop creates ignored unsigned win-unpacked package plus machine-readable report with stable digest/size/Electron metadata; desktop-shell e2e covers packaged file:// launch, M5 product-gate fixture, sandbox and placeholder ports; no new deps, package manifest/lockfile, sim authority, installer/signing/updater/store/M7 scope changes. Required checks pass.
